---
title: "Margaret Ernestine Bowles"
---

## Margaret Ernestine Bowles

**Dates:** (1894-1984)

### Description

great-niece of CMY

### Biography

Second daughter of Henry and Alethea Bowles, she married (1918) Henry Fielding Bond.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 2d [1900]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from [1899-1900?]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
